final_prompt.prompt:
Create a movie poster for "大话西游" reimagined in 1990s Hong Kong cinema style.

Style/medium: needs a "90年代港片" (1990s HK cinema) aesthetic with film grain — exact grain level and film stock treatment are yours
Composition: must include embracing couple as foreground focal point, two distant figures standing in background
Subject: must include 至尊宝 and 紫霞 sharing a kiss/embrace on a city wall (foreground), 牛魔王 and 唐僧 standing in the distance (background)
Scene/backdrop: must include a city wall setting
Lighting/mood: needs a cinematic, romantically charged atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a warm, faded filmic direction — exact tones and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a film grain surface treatment — exact grain weight and texture are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve all four named characters; foreground/background spatial separation must be clear
Avoid:
